ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the model is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in megabytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the dataset is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "fitting_time" REAL /* Time taken to fit the model */,
  "scoring_time" REAL /* Time taken to score the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* AUC-ROC of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the evaluation is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_params_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation history entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "perf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the model */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the shared model (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)
